reference_notes: Public template: provide your own private reference image or hosted URL through BLOG_HERO_REFERENCE_URL.

visual_lock.face: replace with your brand character description

outfit_rule: Agent may choose outfit, pose, and props according to cover_hook and scene_hint.
prompt_fragment: Blog host on COVER ONLY: preserve the provided reference face. Outfit, pose, and props are creative choices for the hook.
cover_hook_rules: Cover is a click hook: conflict, reader pain, and reason to open.
Use readable local-language caption on the cover.
Keep inline panels useful and in the same visual series.
